    [Documentation](https://documentation.g2.com/docs/g2-mcp-server)[Privacy Policy](https://legal.g2.com/privacy-policy)[Support](https://support.g2.com/)
    

The G2 MCP server brings real-time Buyer Intent and review insights into AI workflows. It lets AI summarize in-market buyer research, competitive interest, and customer sentiment from the G2 platform. Teams can automatically prioritize accounts, personalize outreach, inform messaging, and uncover market trends—turning trusted, first-party buyer data into action.

You can use G2 to:

**Company Research for Sales Outreach:**  
"Show me companies researching our products with their intent scores and which competitors they're comparing"

**Prioritize Prospecting Accounts:**  
"Which accounts should I prioritize this week based on G2 intent signals?"

**Pre-Call Briefing:**  
"Give me a pre-call briefing for \[Company Name\] using G2 data"

**Competitive Intelligence:**  
"What do recent reviews say about our competitors in the CRM category?"
